mapper.select: select * from daily_question where question_date = #{questionDate} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into daily_question(question_date, question_id, create_time) values (#{questionDate}, #{questionId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select dq.question_date as questionDate, dq.question_id as questionId, q.subject as subject, q.type as type, q.difficulty as difficulty, q.title as title, q.status as status from daily_question dq left join question q on dq.question_id = q.id where dq.question_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} order by dq.question_date desc
